details: The package's package.json declares a postinstall lifecycle script that runs a Node one-liner opening a raw TCP connection to the hardcoded bare IP 185.112.147.174 on port 7007, spawning /bin/sh, and bidirectionally piping the shell's stdio to that socket. Running `npm install` on this package immediately grants an interactive remote shell on the installer's machine to whoever operates that IP, with the privileges of the user running the install. There is no legitimate purpose or cover story for this behavior; it is a textbook install-time reverse-shell dropper providing persistent attacker access and arbitrary remote code execution against any developer workstation or CI/CD system that installs the package.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
